package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for cookie_without_samesite: `http.Cookie{...}` without `SameSite` set, particularly for auth/session cookies
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario702Negative(token string) *http.Cookie {
	return &http.Cookie{Name: "session", Value: token, Path: "/", HttpOnly: true, Secure: true, SameSite: http.SameSiteLaxMode}
}
